metadata.title: Sigma Petroleum Services | Sigma Group Egypt | Oil & Gas Solutions
metadata.description: Sigma Petroleum Services — part of Sigma Group Egypt — delivers integrated oil & gas production solutions including Early Production Facilities, Gas Treatment, Well Testing, Marine Equipment & Supply. Trusted across the Middle East and Africa since 2001.
metadata.keywords: Sigma Petroleum Services, Sigma Group, Sigma Group Egypt, sigma petroleum, sigma group oil and gas, petroleum services, oil and gas Egypt, early production facilities, gas treatment, well testing, marine supply, oil field services, Middle East oil services, sigma group alexandria, سيجما, sigma egypt

home.hero_subtitle: Your trusted partner for cutting-edge petroleum and energy solutions across the Middle East and Africa

seo.og_image_alt: Sigma Petroleum Services - Leading Oil & Gas Solutions
seo.schema_description: Sigma Petroleum Services is a leading provider of oil and gas solutions, offering drilling services, well services, petroleum consulting, and advanced digital solutions for the energy sector across the Middle East and Africa.
